let notGeneralActions = set_union(webActions, logicActions, computeActions, recoveryServicesActions,
                                  storageActions, keyvaultActions, hybridComputeActions, sqlActions, sqlVirtualMachineActions,
                                  DBforMariaDBActions, dbformysqlActions, dbforpostgresqlActions, documentdbActions);
let allActions = set_union(notGeneralActions, generalActions, criticalDataActions);
let criticalSubs = Nodes
| where EntityIds has 'azureresourceid'
| mv-expand EntityIds
| where EntityIds has 'azureresourceid'
| extend resourceType = tolower(Label)
| extend vmSubscription = iff(Label == 'subscriptions', EntityIds['id'], tostring(extract(@'(.+)\/resourcegroups', 1, tolower((EntityIds)['id']))))
| where isnotempty(vmSubscription)
| extend criticalSub = iff((Properties has 'rulebasedcriticalitylevel'), 1,0)
| where criticalSub == 1
| summarize resourceTypes = make_set_if(resourceType, isnotempty(resourceType)), criticalSub = max(criticalSub) by vmSubscription
| where criticalSub == 1;
let criticalIdentities = Edges
| where Label == 'has role on' and SourceNodeLabel in (entityTypes) and TargetNodeLabel == 'subscriptions'
| where strcat('/subscriptions/', TargetNodeName ) in ((criticalSubs | distinct vmSubscription))
| where Properties has_any (allActions)
| extend vmSubscription = strcat('/subscriptions/', TargetNodeName ) | lookup kind=inner (criticalSubs) on vmSubscription
| extend Properties = todynamic(tolower(Properties))
| extend roles = Properties['permissions']['roles']
| mv-expand roles
| extend actions = roles['actions']
| extend dataActions = roles['dataactions']
| extend hasCriticalDataActions = iff(array_length(set_intersect(criticalDataActions, dataActions)) > 0, 1, 0)
| mv-expand actions
| where (hasCriticalDataActions == 1 or actions in (generalActions)) or (actions  in (notGeneralActions) and (
(resourceTypes  has_any ('microsoft.compute/virtualmachines', 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescalesets') and actions in (computeActions)) or 
(resourceTypes  has_any ('microsoft.storage/storageaccounts') and actions in (storageActions)) or 
(resourceTypes  has_any ('microsoft.recoveryservices/vaults') and actions in (recoveryServicesActions)) or 
(resourceTypes  has_any ('microsoft.hybridcompute/machines') and actions in (hybridComputeActions)) or 
(resourceTypes  has_any ('microsoft.web/sites', 'microsoft.web/serverfarms') and actions in (webActions)) or 
(resourceTypes  has_any ('microsoft.logic/workflows') and actions in (logicActions)) or 
(resourceTypes  has_any ('microsoft.sql/managedinstances', 'microsoft.sql/servers', 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases') and actions in (sqlActions)) or 
(resourceTypes  has_any ('microsoft.sqlvirtualmachine/sqlvirtualmachines') and actions in (sqlVirtualMachineActions)) or 
(resourceTypes  has_any ('microsoft.keyvault/vaults') and actions in (keyvaultActions)) or 
(resourceTypes  has_any ('microsoft.dbforpostgresql/servers', 'microsoft.dbforpostgresql/flexibleservers') and actions in (dbforpostgresqlActions)) or 
(resourceTypes  has_any ('microsoft.dbformysql/servers', 'microsoft.dbformysql/flexibleservers') and actions in (dbformysqlActions)) or 
(resourceTypes  has_any ('microsoft.dbformariadb/servers') and actions in (DBforMariaDBActions))  or 
(resourceTypes  has_any ('microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts') and actions in (documentdbActions))
)
)

This often indicates that the Key Vault is used by critical workloads, such as production services.","createdBy":"","createdByName":null,"lastUpdatedBy":"","lastUpdatedByName":null,"lastUpdateTime":null,"ruleDefinition":null,"kqlQuery":"let tenantsKVMaxSourceValues = Edges
    | where Label == 'has role on' and TargetNodeLabel == 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' and SourceNodeLabel in ('serviceprincipal', 'managedidentity')
    | summarize dcount(SourceNodeId) by TargetNodeId, TenantId
    | summarize maxSourceNodes = max(dcount_SourceNodeId) by TenantId | where maxSourceNodes > 1;
    let tenantKvs = Edges
    | where TenantId in ((tenantsKVMaxSourceValues | distinct TenantId))
    | where Label == 'has role on' and TargetNodeLabel == 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' and SourceNodeLabel in ('serviceprincipal', 'managedidentity')
    | summarize sourceNodesCount = dcount(SourceNodeId) by TargetNodeId, TenantId | where sourceNodesCount > 1
    | where sourceNodesCount in ((tenantsKVMaxSourceValues | distinct maxSourceNodes))
    | join kind=inner (tenantsKVMaxSourceValues) on ($left.TenantId == $right.TenantId) and ($left.sourceNodesCount == $right.maxSourceNodes)
    | distinct TargetNodeId;

    | where Id in ((tenantKvs))
    | extend RuleId = '21a75e72eeaa4a0ea5e70e7277154beb'","isDisabled":false,"actions":[{"actionType":"CriticalityLevel","value":1,"creationTime":"0001-01-01T00:00:00"}],"affectedAssetsCount":0,"creationTime":null,"ruleType":"Predefined","criticalityLevel":1,"isDeleted":false,"lastExecutionTime":"2026-04-23T23:55:32.725356Z","timestamp":"2026-04-24T00:03:50.2329019Z","assetType":"CloudResources","classificationValue":"Azure Key Vaults with Many Connected Identities"},{"orgId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","tenantId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","ruleId":"6d3921e5fb944066a8f7440d6081ae96","ruleName":"Highly active Azure Key Vaults with large number of operations","ruleDescription":"This rule identifies and classifies Azure Key Vaults that experience a high volume of operations, indicating their criticality within the cloud environment.","createdBy":"","createdByName":null,"lastUpdatedBy":"","lastUpdatedByName":null,"lastUpdateTime":null,"ruleDefinition":null,"kqlQuery":"let defenderForKeyVaultClusters = union cluster('__PARAM(DefenderForKeyVaultCUSClusterName)__.kusto.windows.net').database('Analytics').AuditLogs, cluster('__PARAM(DefenderForKeyVaultWEUClusterName)__.kusto.windows.net').database('Analytics').AuditLogs, cluster('__PARAM(DefenderForKeyVaultSEAClusterName)__.kusto.windows.net').database('Analytics').AuditLogs; let defenderForKeyVaultSubTenantMap = cluster('__PARAM(DefenderForKeyVaultCUSClusterName)__.kusto.windows.net').database('Analytics').SubTenantMap | project SubscriptionId= tostring(SubscriptionId), TenantId = tostring(TenantId); let tenants = Nodes
    | where Label == 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults'
    | distinct TenantId;
    defenderForKeyVaultClusters
    | where TIMESTAMP >= ago(1d)
    | project resourceid = tolower(resourceId), SubscriptionId = tolower(SubscriptionId), sum_OpCount
    | summarize count(sum_OpCount) by resourceid,SubscriptionId
    | join kind= leftouter (defenderForKeyVaultSubTenantMap) on SubscriptionId
    | where TenantId in (tenants)
    | summarize operation95percentile = percentile(count_sum_OpCount,95) by TenantId
    | join kind= rightouter hint.strategy=broadcast (defenderForKeyVaultClusters
    | where TIMESTAMP >= ago(1d)
    | project resourceid = tolower(resourceId), SubscriptionId = tolower(SubscriptionId), sum_OpCount
    | summarize count(sum_OpCount) by resourceid,SubscriptionId
    | summarize arg_max(count_sum_OpCount, resourceid) by SubscriptionId
    | join kind= leftouter (defenderForKeyVaultSubTenantMap) on SubscriptionId) on TenantId
    | where count_sum_OpCount > operation95percentile
    | distinct resourceid
    | join kind = inner hint.strategy=broadcast (Nodes
    | where Label == 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults'
    | summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by Id
    | extend EntityIdsDictionary_parsed = parse_json(EntityIdsDictionary)

        let filteredDevices = 
            Nodes
            | where Label == 'device'
            | where Properties has_cs 'criticalityLevel'
            | where Properties has_cs 'Security Operations Admin Device' or Properties has_cs 'SecurityOperations Admin Device'
            | distinct SourceNodeId = Id;
        let filteredEdges = Edges | where Label == 'frequently logged in by';
        let singleLoginDevices = 
            filteredDevices
            | join kind=inner hint.shufflekey=SourceNodeId filteredEdges on SourceNodeId
            | summarize loginCount = dcount(TargetNodeId) by SourceNodeId
            | where loginCount == 1;
        let usersLoggedIntoSingleLoginDevices = 
            singleLoginDevices
            | join kind=inner hint.shufflekey=SourceNodeId filteredEdges on SourceNodeId
            | distinct Id = TargetNodeId;
        let userDetails = 
            usersLoggedIntoSingleLoginDevices
            | join kind=inner hint.shufflekey=Id (
                Nodes
                | where Label == 'user'
            ) on Id
            | extend RuleId = 'd8dfa5f68b9947ab94e3ee6baa57a783';
        userDetails","isDisabled":false,"actions":[{"actionType":"CriticalityLevel","value":2,"creationTime":"0001-01-01T00:00:00"}],"affectedAssetsCount":0,"creationTime":null,"ruleType":"Predefined","criticalityLevel":2,"isDeleted":false,"lastExecutionTime":"2026-04-23T23:55:32.725356Z","timestamp":"2026-04-24T00:03:50.232904Z","assetType":"Identities","classificationValue":"SecurityOperationsAdminUser"},{"orgId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","tenantId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","ruleId":"3fd089ffe51b430aac9fb51787f16039","ruleName":"Global Administrator","ruleDescription":"Identities in this role can manage all aspects of Microsoft Entra ID and Microsoft services that use Microsoft Entra identities.","createdBy":"","createdByName":null,"lastUpdatedBy":"","lastUpdatedByName":null,"lastUpdateTime":null,"ruleDefinition":null,"kqlQuery":"Nodes

This often indicates that the cluster is used for critical workloads, such as production workloads.","createdBy":"","createdByName":null,"lastUpdatedBy":"","lastUpdatedByName":null,"lastUpdateTime":null,"ruleDefinition":null,"kqlQuery":"let entityStoreClusters = union cluster('__PARAM(EntityStoreClusterName)__').database('DiscoveryAzure').Resources, cluster('__PARAM(SecondaryEntityStoreClusterName)__').database('DiscoveryAzure').Resources; let baseData = entityStoreClusters
    | where TimeStamp > ago(12h)
    | where tolower(SdksInfo.Type) == 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters'
    | extend ClusterId = tolower(RecordIdentifierInfo['RecordAzureUniqueIdentifier'])
    | summarize hint.strategy=shuffle arg_max(TimeStamp, *) by tostring(ClusterId)
    | extend sub = extract(@'/subscriptions/([0-9a-fA-F\-]36)', 1, ClusterId)
    | extend tenantId = RecordOrganizationInfo.TenantId
    | extend agentPoolProfiles = parse_json(Record.properties.agentPoolProfiles)
    | mv-expand agentPoolProfiles
    | extend count = agentPoolProfiles.count
    | summarize nodesCount = sum(toint(count)) by tostring(ClusterId), tostring(tenantId), tostring(sub);
    let maxNodesCountPerSub = baseData
    | summarize maxNodeCount = max(nodesCount) by sub | where maxNodeCount > 15;
    let nodes95PercentilePerTenant = baseData
    | summarize 95PercentileOfNodesPerTenant = percentile(nodesCount, 95) by tostring(tenantId);
    let clustersPerTenant = baseData
    | distinct tenantId, tostring(ClusterId)
    | summarize clustersPerTenant = count()by tenantId;
    let MultipleNodesClusters = baseData
    | join kind=inner nodes95PercentilePerTenant on tenantId | project-away tenantId1
    | join kind=inner clustersPerTenant on tenantId | project-away tenantId1
    | join kind=leftouter  maxNodesCountPerSub on $left.sub == $right.sub and $left.nodesCount == $right.maxNodeCount | project-away sub1
    | extend thresholdNum = iff(clustersPerTenant > 15, 95PercentileOfNodesPerTenant, 23) //23 is the 95 percentile of nodes count per cluster for tenants with less than 15 clusters
    | where (nodesCount >= thresholdNum and nodesCount > 15) or nodesCount == maxNodeCount
    | distinct ClusterId;

This often indicates that the cluster is used for critical workloads, such as production workloads.","createdBy":"","createdByName":null,"lastUpdatedBy":"","lastUpdatedByName":null,"lastUpdateTime":null,"ruleDefinition":null,"kqlQuery":"let entityStoreClusters = union cluster('__PARAM(EntityStoreClusterName)__').database('DiscoveryAzure').Resources, cluster('__PARAM(SecondaryEntityStoreClusterName)__').database('DiscoveryAzure').Resources; let baseData = entityStoreClusters
    | where TimeStamp > ago(12h)

    | summarize arg_max(TimeStamp, *) by tostring(ClusterId)

    | extend thresholdNum = iff(clustersPerTenant > 10, 94PercentileOfNodesInTenant, 10)
    | where nodesCount >= thresholdNum and nodesCount > 9
    | distinct ClusterId;

Confidential VMs provide increased isolation, privacy, and encryption, and are usually used for critical or highly sensitive data and workloads.","createdBy":"","createdByName":null,"lastUpdatedBy":"","lastUpdatedByName":null,"lastUpdateTime":null,"ruleDefinition":null,"kqlQuery":"let entityStoreClusters = union cluster('__PARAM(EntityStoreClusterName)__').database('DiscoveryAzure').Resources, cluster('__PARAM(SecondaryEntityStoreClusterName)__').database('DiscoveryAzure').Resources; let confidentialVMs = entityStoreClusters
    | where TimeStamp > ago(12h)
    | where tolower(SdksInfo.Type) == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines' and Record has 'confidentialvm'
    | extend VMId = tolower(RecordIdentifierInfo['RecordAzureUniqueIdentifier'])
    | summarize hint.strategy=shuffle arg_max(TimeStamp,*) by VMId
    | extend Record = tolower(Record)
    | where parse_json(Record)['properties']['securityprofile']['securitytype'] == 'confidentialvm'
    | extend TenantId = tostring(RecordOrganizationInfo['TenantId']), VMId = tolower(RecordIdentifierInfo['RecordAzureUniqueIdentifier'])
    | distinct TenantId, VMId;
    Nodes
    | where Label == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
    | where EntityIds has 'AzureResourceId'
    | mv-expand EntityIds
    | where tolower(EntityIds['type']) == 'azureresourceid'
    | extend VMId = tolower(EntityIds['id']) | where isnotempty(VMId)
    | extend RuleId = '6aacfd5b22a747a78d451f315ed41447'
    | lookup kind=inner ((confidentialVMs)) on $left.TenantId == $right.TenantId and VMId","isDisabled":false,"actions":[{"actionType":"CriticalityLevel","value":2,"creationTime":"0001-01-01T00:00:00"}],"affectedAssetsCount":0,"creationTime":null,"ruleType":"Predefined","criticalityLevel":2,"isDeleted":false,"lastExecutionTime":"2026-04-23T23:55:32.725356Z","timestamp":"2026-04-24T00:03:50.2329018Z","assetType":"CloudResources","classificationValue":"Confidential Azure Virtual Machine"},{"orgId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","tenantId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","ruleId":"092337da8a0b4814990d69f3e0010790","ruleName":"Azure Virtual Machine with High Availability and Performance","ruleDescription":"This rule applies to Azure virtual machines that use premium Azure storage and are configured with an availability set. Availability sets improve resilience and are often indicated for business critical VMs that need high availability.","createdBy":"","createdByName":null,"lastUpdatedBy":"","lastUpdatedByName":null,"lastUpdateTime":null,"ruleDefinition":null,"kqlQuery":"let entityStoreClusters = union cluster('__PARAM(EntityStoreClusterName)__').database('DiscoveryAzure').Resources, cluster('__PARAM(SecondaryEntityStoreClusterName)__').database('DiscoveryAzure').Resources; let highlyReliableAndHighPerformance = entityStoreClusters
    | where TimeStamp > ago(12h)
    | where tolower(SdksInfo.Type) == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines' and Record has_all ('availabilitySet', 'premium')
    | extend VMId = tolower(parse_json(RecordIdentifierInfo)['RecordAzureUniqueIdentifier']) | where isnotempty(VMId)
    | summarize hint.strategy=shuffle arg_max(TimeStamp,*) by VMId
    | extend tenantId = tostring(parse_json(RecordOrganizationInfo)['TenantId']) | where isnotempty(tenantId)
    | extend Record = tolower(Record)
    | extend storageaccounttype = extract_json('$.properties.storageprofile.osdisk.manageddisk.storageaccounttype', Record)
    | where storageaccounttype in ('premium_lrs', 'premium_zrs')
    | extend availabilityset = extract_json('$.properties.availabilityset', Record)
    | where isnotempty(availabilityset)
    | distinct tenantId, VMId;
    Nodes
    | where Label == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
    | where EntityIds has 'AzureResourceId'
    | mv-expand EntityIds
    | where tolower(EntityIds ['type']) == 'azureresourceid'
    | extend VMId = tolower(EntityIds['id']) | where isnotempty(VMId)
    | lookup kind=inner ((highlyReliableAndHighPerformance)) on $left.TenantId == $right.tenantId and VMId
    | extend RuleId = '092337da8a0b4814990d69f3e0010790'
    | project Id, Properties, TenantId","isDisabled":false,"actions":[{"actionType":"CriticalityLevel","value":3,"creationTime":"0001-01-01T00:00:00"}],"affectedAssetsCount":0,"creationTime":null,"ruleType":"Predefined","criticalityLevel":3,"isDeleted":false,"lastExecutionTime":"2026-04-23T23:55:32.725356Z","timestamp":"2026-04-24T00:03:50.2329018Z","assetType":"CloudResources","classificationValue":"Azure Virtual Machine with High Availability and Performance"},{"orgId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","tenantId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","ruleId":"63224c2c7e6e4135988431269e8e0c2c","ruleName":"APIs with Sensitive Data","ruleDescription":"This rule applies to APIs that contain sensitive data. This often indicates that the API is used for critical production workloads, and may require additional monitoring and protection.","createdBy":"","createdByName":null,"lastUpdatedBy":"","lastUpdatedByName":null,"lastUpdateTime":null,"ruleDefinition":null,"kqlQuery":"Nodes
    | where Label in ('microsoft.apimanagement/service/apis/operations', 'microsoft.apimanagement/service/apis')                
    | where Properties has 'containsSensitiveData'
    | where array_length(Properties.containsSensitiveData.evidence.edgeIds) > 0
    | extend RuleId = '63224c2c7e6e4135988431269e8e0c2c'
    | project-keep Timestamp, TenantId, Id, Properties, EntityIds, Label, RuleId
    | summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by Id","isDisabled":false,"actions":[{"actionType":"CriticalityLevel","value":2,"creationTime":"0001-01-01T00:00:00"}],"affectedAssetsCount":0,"creationTime":null,"ruleType":"Predefined","criticalityLevel":2,"isDeleted":false,"lastExecutionTime":"2026-04-23T23:55:32.725356Z","timestamp":"2026-04-24T00:03:50.2329041Z","assetType":"CloudResources","classificationValue":"APIsWithSensitiveData"}]
